{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47065", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "ZDRES-232: resolveProxyClass Not Overridden - acceptMatchers Filter Bypass via java.lang.reflect.Proxy


Assessment: Fully addressed.


When the serialised stream contains a TC_PROXYCLASSDESC (the marker for a java.lang.reflect.Proxy ), JDK’s ObjectInputStream.readProxyDesc() is dispatched. JDK then calls the default  ObjectInputStream.resolveProxyClass(interfaces) implementation, which performs Class.forName(intf, false, latestUserDefinedLoader()) for EACH interface name and constructs the proxy class â€” bypassing the accepted classes list .


ZDRES-233: Class.forName(name, initialize=true, classLoader) in readClassDescriptor Triggers Static Initialiser of Allow-Listed Classes


Assessment: Fully addressed.


For ANY class on the allow-list, deserialising a stream that names it triggers the class’s (static initialiser) BEFORE any instance is constructed. This means an attacker who supplies a class name on the allow-list (e.g., the developer wrote accept(“com.myapp.*") , attacker supplies com.myapp.SomeClass ) causes <clinit> of SomeClass â€” and many real-world classes have side-effecting static initialisers


Both issues have been fixed.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00468, "percentile": 0.37514}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v3pr-hxpr-mfm8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-13T17:24:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v3pr-hxpr-mfm8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v3pr-hxpr-mfm8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47065"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-03T11:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-06-03T12:30:26Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47065", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/y7xj1bl8qo47p9bktb11hg5v6k1d4dyj", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v3pr-hxpr-mfm8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/mina", "summary": "Apache MINA: Critical Deserialization Allow-list Bypass via resolveProxyClass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-13T17:24:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v3pr-hxpr-mfm8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.2.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.mina:mina-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.2.0, < 2.2.8"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.1.13", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.mina:mina-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.1.0, < 2.1.13"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.0.29", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.mina:mina-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.29"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache MINA: Critical Deserialization Allow-list Bypass via resolveProxyClass
